---
id: unmask-health-record
title: "Unmask health record"
description: "Removes the masked status from a health record so it can be checked again"

hide_title: true

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/health/{id}/unmask"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes the masked status from a health record so it can be checked again
